name: Fudge-Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Stir corn syrup and sugar in a heavy medium saucepan over medium heat until the sugar dissolves and the mixture boils. Remove from heat.
3. Add chocolate and butter and stir until melted and the mixture is smooth. Whisk in eggs, vanilla, and salt.
4. Stir in pecans. Pour filling into crust.
5. Bake until the filling is set, about 40 minutes. Cool slightly. Serve warm or at room temperature.
